title: dupatya lanuginosa
intro: Dupatya lanuginosa, also known as Khas or Salsola, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dupatya lanuginosa include the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in the form of tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
